title: Ignition
description: A simple mod that adds more versatile explosives
body:
Ever wanted more explosives? Well this mod is the answer! It adds 3 more explosives to the game.

#1 Dynamite: a relatively small and portable explosive.![dynamite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c493afdd400b9f890e0b10e1094332cd1b57b82_0.webp)

#2 Cluster Bomb: A larger, more destructive form of tnt
![cluster bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/682dfcccd3e20b5db0d14a0b71f9b3145e9dbf9a.png)

#3 Ballistic Missile: A highly dangerous flying explosive. If used repetedly can make massive craters![Ballistic Missile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f17e71ad20a1488d821ba5f2162e35b95ae416b9.png)


Mod Demonstration here<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zjAhimYEq1g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
